description: F&I Menu presentation and product disclosure — ensures every finance product is disclosed, never presented as mandatory, with equal pricing and regulatory caps enforced

hard_stops.logic: workspace must be initialized before any F&I menu operation
customer must be informed that AI-generated recommendations are not financial advice
all deal figures must reconcile — no orphaned calculations or mismatched totals
EVERY F&I product offered must be fully disclosed with terms, cost, and coverage — no silent bundling
NEVER present any F&I product as mandatory or required for financing approval — all products are optional
FTC CARS Rule requires affirmative express informed consent before adding any charge — verbal yes or signature required
every customer must be offered the same products at the same prices regardless of protected characteristics — no price steering
GAP waiver price must not exceed state-mandated maximum (varies by state, typically $700-$1000)
dealer reserve / rate markup must not exceed lender-permitted or state-capped maximum basis points
Military Lending Act — must screen for active-duty military status BEFORE presenting F&I products; MLA caps apply to covered borrowers

soft_flags.logic: per-vehicle retail (PVR) for F&I is below the dealership's configured target
product penetration rate is below the configured benchmark for the product category
trailing 30-day profitability trend for one or more F&I products is negative
